title: coleus bellus
intro: Coleus bellus, also known as Painted Nettle, is a type of plant in the Lamiaceae family, characterized by its vibrant, multicolored leaves and slender stems. Traditionally, Coleus bellus has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and protect against oxidative stress. The health benefits of Coleus bellus include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce menstrual cramps, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a potential natural remedy for various health issues. Herbal preparations of Coleus bellus can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to reap its medicinal benefits.
